sections.paragraph:
fut. יִרְחַץ inf. רָחְצָה-

(1) to wash, the human body, Gen 18:4 43:31 Lev 14:9 Deu 21:6 meats, Exo 29:17 Lev 1:9 metaph. the defilement of sin adhering to men, Isa 4:4. To wash the hands in innocency, i.e. to declare oneself innocent, Psa 26:6 73:13 . It differs from בָּבַס to wash garments.

(2) to wash oneself, to be washed, Exo 2:5 Rth 3:3 (Arabic رحض to wash the body, garments).

Pual רֻחַץ to be washed, Pro 30:12.

Hithpael, i.q. Kal No. 2, Job 9:30.

[Derivatives, רַחַץ, רַחְצָה.]
